mapper.insert: insert into mail_outbox (audience, mail_type, recipient, subject, body, status) values (#{audience}, #{type}, #{recipient}, #{subject}, #{body}, 'pending')
mapper.select: select id, recipient, subject, body from mail_outbox where status in ('pending', 'failed') and (next_attempt_at is null or next_attempt_at <= current_timestamp) order by created_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
